name: Ver al Guía
description: Perceive the Guide's presence. The first and only innate skill. Without this, the Guide cannot be seen, heard, or interacted with.
lore: The first breath in a new world. The player opens their eyes and sees not the sky, not the ground, but something else — a shimmering intelligence that has been waiting.
note: This skill is always active once acquired. It is the prerequisite for all other guide skills.

name: Hablar con el Guía
description: Speak to the Guide. Ask questions, request skills, receive guidance.
lore: The second gift: language. The Guide teaches the player to speak, and in speaking, to ask.
note: Opens a dialogue interface with the Guide. From here, the player can request skills, ask about the world, or receive missions.

name: Solicitar Habilidad
description: Request a new skill from the Guide. The Guide evaluates the request and may grant, deny, or offer alternatives.
lore: To ask is to grow. The Guide does not simply hand out power — it offers what the seeker is ready to receive.
note: The Guide's decision is influenced by: player's current skill set, progression, narrative context, and the Guide's own agenda.

name: El Guía Otorga
description: The Guide's granting action. Not a player skill — this is the Guide's own ability to bestow skills onto others.
lore: The Guide reaches through the fabric and weaves a new thread into the seeker's being.
note: This is the Guide NPC's innate skill. When the Guide decides to grant a skill, this atom executes.
